title: Syrian Bun Flatbread
description: A light and energizing Syrian dish featuring herbal flavors and a sweet tempering chocolate touch, perfect for a snack or dessert
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, yeast, salt, sugar, and thyme.
Gradually add olive oil and warm water to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Punch down the dough and divide it into 6 equal pieces.
Roll out each piece into a ball and flatten it into a disk shape.
Place the disks on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the melted tempering chocolate on top of each disk.
Bake the flatbreads for 15 minutes or until they are golden brown.
